Description: Unique identifier of a Service Request (SR) in the open data set
Notes:: This is NOT the Service Request (SR) # provided to the initiating customer.  SR #s are not available in this data set.

Description: Date SR  was created
Expected Values: Date in format MM/DD/YY HH:MM:SS AM/PM

Description: Date SR was closed by responding agency
Expected Values: Date in format MM/DD/YY HH:MM:SS AM/PM

Description: Acronym of responding City Government Agency
Full Agency name of responding City Government Agency
This is the fist level of a hierarchy identifying the topic of the incident or condition. Complaint Type may have a corresponding Descriptor (below) or may stand alone.
This is  associated to the Complaint Type, and provides further detail on the incident or condition. Descriptor values are dependent on the Complaint Type, and are not always required in SR.
Status of SR submitted
Date when responding agency is expected to update the SR.  This is based on the Complaint Type and internal Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
Expected Values: Date in format MM/DD/YY HH:MM:SS AM/PM

Description: Date when responding agency last updated the SR.
Expected Values: Date in format MM/DD/YY HH:MM:SS AM/PM

Description: Describes the last action taken on the SR by the responding agency.  May describe next or future steps.
Describes the type of location used in the address information
Incident location zip code, provided by geo validation.
House number of incident address provided by submitter.
Street name of incident address provided by the submitter
First Cross street based on the geo validated incident location
Second Cross Street based on the geo validated incident location
First intersecting street based on geo validated incident location
Second intersecting street based on geo validated incident location
Type of incident location information available.
Expected Values: Values: Address; Block face; Intersection; LatLong; Placename

Description: City of the incident location provided by geovalidation.
If the incident location is identified as a Landmark the name of the landmark will display here
If available, this field describes the type of city facility associated to the SR
Provided by geovalidation.
Borough Block and Lot, provided by geovalidation.  Parcel number to identify the location of location of buildings and properties in NYC.
Provided by the submitter and confirmed by geovalidation.
Geo validated, X coordinate of the incident location.
Geo validated,  Y coordinate of the incident location.
Indicates how the SR was submitted to 311.  i.e. By Phone, Online, Mobile, Other or Unknown.
Expected Values: PHONE, ONLINE, MOBILE, OTHER and UNKNOWN
Notes:: Phone - submitted by a 311 call center agent on behalf of a customer.  Online - submitted through the 311 mobile app.  Other - submitted by another city agency or source.  Unknown - unable to determine the source channel of the SR.

Description: Geo based Lat of the incident location
Geo based Long of the incident location
Combination of the geo based lat & long of the incident location
If the incident location is a Parks Dept facility, the Name of the facility will appear here
The borough of incident if it is a Parks Dept facility
If the incident is a taxi, this field describes the type of TLC vehicle.
Expected Values: Car Service; Commuter Van; Green Taxi

Description: If the incident is identified as a taxi, this field will display the borough of the taxi company.
If the incident is identified as a taxi, this field displays the taxi pick up location
Expected Values: Grand Central Station; Intersection; JKF Airport; La Guardia Airport; New York-Penn Station; Other; Port Authority Bus Terminal

Description: If the incident is identified as a Bridge/Highway, the name will be displayed here.
If the incident is identified as a Bridge/Highway, the direction where the issue took place would be displayed here.
If the incident location was Bridge/Highway this column differentiates if the issue was on the Road or the Ramp.
Additional information on the section of the Bridge/Highway were the incident took place.
